name: Electoral & Boundaries Commission
shortDescription: Maintains accurate registers for the national and electoral registration systems and ensures the conduct of free, fair, and transparent elections in Barbados.
intro: The commission's mission is to maintain accurate registers for the national and electoral registration systems and to ensure the conduct of free, fair, and transparent elections.

value: Ground Floor & 4th Floor Warrens Tower II
